title: Rename and refresh smallclaw-team-design to Prometheus team runtime
summary: Create a Prometheus-aligned successor to smallclaw-team-design and preserve compatibility with a temporary redirect path.
details:
Implement a safe rename/refresh for team design guidance.

Scope:
1. Create a new skill directory and SKILL.md under `skills/prometheus-team-design/` with updated naming, terminology, and runtime model aligned to managed teams/coordinator flows.
2. Update references to current Prometheus team architecture patterns (manager/coordinator, dispatch, goal management, review cadence).
3. Keep `skills/smallclaw-team-design/SKILL.md` as a compatibility shim for one release cycle, with a clear deprecation notice and redirect to the new skill.
4. Ensure triggers for the new skill cover existing team-design intents.

Acceptance:
- New canonical skill exists with complete frontmatter + triggers.
- Legacy skill clearly redirects and is marked deprecated.
- No loss of practical team-design guidance.

affectedFiles.description: New canonical Prometheus-branded team design skill.
Deprecation shim with redirect to new skill and compatibility note.
Register new skill entry while keeping legacy one available during transition.

diffPreview:
+ New `prometheus-team-design` skill with modern runtime vocabulary.
~ Existing `smallclaw-team-design` converted to deprecation/redirect shim.
~ Skill registry updated for the new canonical ID.
estimatedImpact: Eliminates legacy-brand confusion and improves team architecture guidance consistency.
executorPrompt: Create `skills/prometheus-team-design/SKILL.md` as the new canonical team-design playbook aligned to current Prometheus managed-team runtime. Update `skills/smallclaw-team-design/SKILL.md` into a deprecation/redirect shim that points to the new skill while preserving compatibility language. Update `skills/_state.json` to include the new skill ID. Return the exact trigger list and migration note included in both skill files.
